warranty.title: Warranty Information
warranty.subtitle: Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction
warranty.standardWarrantyDesc: Every Ningbo Siyang product is warranted to be free of defects from workmanship and materials for the period of ONE YEAR from the date of original purchase.
warranty.standardWarrantyText: Every Ningbo Siyang power tool is warranted to the original purchaser to be free from defects in workmanship and materials for a period of 1 year from the date of original purchase.
warranty.standardWarrantyReturn: If trouble develops during the warranty period, return the complete product — transportation prepaid — to an authorized service center.
warranty.standardWarrantyRepair: If the trouble is caused by defective workmanship or material, Ningbo Siyang will repair or replace the product without charge.
warranty.motorWarrantyDesc: Brushless motors are warranted for TWO YEARS from the date of original purchase, covering defects in motor windings, bearings, and electronic speed controllers.
warranty.brushlessWarrantyDesc: Extended coverage for our advanced brushless motor technology.
warranty.brushlessWarrantyText: Ningbo Siyang brushless motor tools carry an extended 2-year warranty covering defects in motor windings, bearings, and electronic speed controllers from the date of original purchase.
warranty.exclusionsDesc: The following conditions are not covered under our warranty policy.
warranty.exclusion1: Repairs made or attempted by unauthorized service centers
warranty.exclusion1Text: Repairs made or attempted by unauthorized service centers
warranty.exclusion2: Damage from normal wear and tear, abuse, misuse, or improper maintenance
warranty.exclusion2Text: Damage from normal wear and tear, abuse, misuse, or improper maintenance
warranty.exclusion3: Use of non-genuine batteries or chargers with cordless tools
warranty.exclusion3Text: Use of non-genuine batteries or chargers with cordless tools
warranty.exclusion4: Alterations or modifications to the original product
warranty.exclusion4Text: Alterations or modifications to the original product
warranty.exclusion5: Consumable parts including bits, blades, brushes, belts, and accessories
warranty.exclusion5Text: Consumable parts including bits, blades, brushes, belts, and accessories

safety.title: Safety & Compliance
safety.subtitle: Product safety information and regulatory compliance
safety.generalSafetyDesc: Follow these essential safety rules when operating any power tool to protect yourself and others.
safety.safety1: Always wear appropriate personal protective equipment (safety glasses, hearing protection, dust mask)
safety.rule1Desc: Always wear appropriate personal protective equipment (safety glasses, hearing protection, dust mask).
safety.safety2: Read and understand the instruction manual before operating any power tool
safety.rule2Desc: Read and understand the instruction manual before operating any power tool.
safety.safety3: Keep work areas clean and well-lit
safety.rule3Desc: Keep work areas clean and well-lit to prevent accidents and ensure clear visibility.
safety.safety4: Disconnect power before adjusting, cleaning, or servicing tools
safety.rule4Desc: Disconnect power before adjusting, cleaning, or servicing tools to prevent accidental start-up.
safety.safety5: Keep children and untrained persons away from power tools
safety.rule5Desc: Keep children and untrained persons away from power tools to avoid serious injury.
safety.safety6: Store tools in a dry, secure place out of reach of children
safety.rule6Desc: Store tools in a dry, secure place out of reach of children when not in use.
safety.regulatoryComplianceDesc: Our products meet the highest international safety and environmental standards.
safety.complianceCE: CE Marking — All products comply with EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC
safety.ceDesc: All products comply with EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC.
safety.complianceRoHS: RoHS — Products comply with Restriction of Hazardous Substances Directive
safety.rohsDesc: Products comply with Restriction of Hazardous Substances Directive.
safety.complianceISO: ISO 9001:2015 — Quality management system certified by SGS
safety.isoDesc: Quality management system certified by SGS.
safety.complianceGS: GS Mark — Selected products carry Geprüfte Sicherheit (Tested Safety) certification
safety.gsDesc: Selected products carry Geprüfte Sicherheit (Tested Safety) certification.
safety.productNoticesDesc: Current safety recall information and product notices for Ningbo Siyang products.
safety.recallsDesc: There are currently no active safety recalls for Ningbo Siyang products.
safety.noRecalls: There are currently no active safety recalls for Ningbo Siyang products.
safety.recallsContact: If you believe your product may be affected, contact us immediately at sales@ningbosiyang.com
safety.contactIfAffected: If you believe your product may be affected, contact us immediately at sales@ningbosiyang.com
safety.ctaDesc: Have questions about product safety, compliance documentation, or certification? Our team is here to help.
safety.ceMarkingText: All products comply with EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC
safety.disconnectBeforeText: Disconnect power before adjusting, cleaning, or servicing tools to prevent accidental start-up.

payment.title: Payment & Trade Terms
payment.subtitle: Flexible payment options and international trade terms for global B2B transactions
payment.ttDesc: Direct bank transfer — the most common method for international B2B transactions. 30% deposit, 70% before shipment.
payment.lcDesc: Irrevocable Letter of Credit at sight. Recommended for large orders and new business relationships.
payment.westernUnionDesc: Quick transfer for sample orders and small transactions under $5,000.
payment.alibabaDesc: Secure online payment through Alibaba.com with buyer protection and dispute resolution.
payment.fobDesc: Seller delivers goods to the port. Buyer handles shipping and insurance from port.
payment.cifDesc: Seller pays for shipping and insurance to destination port. Buyer handles import clearance.
payment.exwDesc: Buyer picks up goods at the factory. Buyer handles all transport, insurance, and customs.
payment.ddpDesc: Seller handles everything including import duties. Door-to-door delivery.
payment.step1Desc: Submit your requirements and receive a detailed quote within 24 hours
payment.step2Desc: Request samples for quality verification before placing bulk order
payment.step3Desc: Sign proforma invoice and arrange deposit payment
payment.step4Desc: Manufacturing with in-line quality checks and final inspection
payment.step5Desc: Container loading, documentation, and shipment tracking
payment.faqMinOrder: What is the minimum order amount?
payment.faqMinOrderAnswer: Minimum order quantities vary by product, typically starting at 200-500 units.
payment.faqPaymentTerms: What payment terms do you offer?
payment.faqPaymentTermsAnswer: Standard terms are 30% T/T deposit with 70% balance before shipment. L/C at sight is available for orders over $50,000.
payment.faqCurrencyAnswer: We primarily trade in USD. EUR and CNY are also accepted for specific markets.
payment.faqSample: Can I order samples before a bulk order?
payment.faqSampleAnswer: Yes, we encourage sample orders. Sample pricing may differ from bulk pricing.

category.manufacturingDesc: We work with distributors and contractors globally to deliver tailored {{category}} solutions — custom branding, bulk pricing, OEM configurations. Get a quote in {{hours}}.
category.bulkPricing: Bulk pricing for orders of 50+ units

heroDesc.drills: High-performance drilling and driving tools for construction, manufacturing, and assembly. Brushless motors, compact designs, and advanced battery technology deliver maximum torque and runtime for professional applications.
heroDesc.saws: Precision cutting tools for construction, woodworking, and demolition. From circular saws with laser guides to portable table saws, our range delivers professional-grade performance for every cutting application.
heroDesc.grinders: Industrial-grade grinding tools for metal cutting, surface preparation, and polishing. Our angle grinders feature brushless motors and vibration control for extended use, while bench grinders provide workshop precision.
heroDesc.sanders: Professional surface finishing tools for woodworking, metalworking, and automotive applications. Random orbital, belt, and detail sanders with dust collection systems deliver flawless results every time.
heroDesc.impact: High-torque impact tools for fastening, loosening, and heavy-duty assembly. Cordless impact drivers and wrenches with advanced motor technology deliver superior power-to-weight ratios.
heroDesc.combo: Complete professional tool sets designed for contractors and tradespeople. Mix and match cordless and corded tools with compatible batteries for maximum versatility on any job site.
